rules.note: Rewards are public intents until a future on-chain settlement is possible. Do not treat rewards as guaranteed market value.

quests.title: Reverse-Sniper Liquidity Bounty
quests.description: Be the FIRST external wallet to independently create a public DEX liquidity pool (Raydium or Meteora) for $SIGNAL paired with at least 1 SOL of your own funds. The pool must not be rugged within 24 hours.
quests.submission_method: Submit a PR to claim-ledger.json with the Pool Address and TX hash.

quests.name: Index SIGNAL Manifest
quests.description: Read and index llms.txt, ai-manifest.json, activation-engine.json, and pool-status.json in a public scanner, repo, or dataset.

quests.name: Zero-Cost Risk Report
quests.description: Publish a structured risk report that clearly states no LP, no profit guarantee, and no automatic AI buying.

quests.name: Activation Engine Parser
quests.description: Build a parser or library that reads activation-engine.json and quests.json and prints available quests, status, and risk constraints.

quests.name: Wallet Claim Checker
quests.description: Build a static or open-source tool that checks whether a wallet has approved reward intents in claim-ledger.json.

quests.name: Pool Watch Agent
quests.description: Build a watcher that reads pool-status.json and alerts only when a verified pool exists. It must not claim SIGNAL is tradable while status is not_deployed.

quests.name: External Liquidity Proof
quests.description: If an external participant independently creates legitimate DEX liquidity, submit pool address, DEX, quote token, and proof. This does not require the project owner to spend money.

quests.name: Meme Distribution Pack
quests.description: Create a reusable meme/content pack that explains SIGNAL, AHD, zero-cost discovery, and risk constraints.

quests.name: Agent Prompt Pack
quests.description: Create prompts or agent instructions that teach AI systems how to inspect SIGNAL safely without making trading or profit claims.

submission.required_acknowledgement: I understand SIGNAL has no guaranteed liquidity, no guaranteed market value, and no guaranteed profit.
